title: Bridge Essay: Reading Covered Faces.
concept: Habit — automaticity, habitual behavior, action monitoring, loss of conscious control.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mechanicality** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Habit — automaticity, habitual behavior, action monitoring, loss of conscious control.

**Reading Covered Faces.** - Cereb Cortex (2022). DOI: 10.1093/cercor/bhab311. PMID: 34521105. Covering faces with masks, due to mandatory pandemic safety regulations, we can no longer rely on the habitual daily-life information. This may be thought-provoking for healthy people, but particularly challenging for individuals with neuropsychiatric and neurodevelopmental conditions.
